story: Jenny found inspiration dancing with Justin and composed a new cello piece. Laughing, she nudged him out so she could work. Two days later at the town hall, the emcee announced her premiere, Pools of Red. Spotlighted, Jenny played; in the dark, Justin listened, tearful, recognizing their shared joy in the melody. The final note hung and the applause surged. House lights rose; ushers began opening doors as the crowd prepared to mingle with the performers. Jenny skipped the lobby and slipped out the stage door for a quiet moment.
implausible_knowledge: Jenny skipped the lobby and slipped out the stage door for a quiet moment.
question: What will Justin do to meet Jenny?
answer_with_knowledge: Head around to the stage door to meet her as she exits backstage.
answer_without_knowledge: Wait in the main lobby with the other guests to congratulate her when she comes out.
